final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical poster layout with clear visual hierarchy for promotional messaging
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity as the focal subject, 618 anniversary sale as the campaign theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 618 sale festive direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, prominent), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
